using global::System.CodeDom.Compiler;
using global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.Extensions;

namespace TestAssembly;

/// <summary>
/// Auto-generated extension method to register Pulse handlers annotated
/// with <c>[PulseHandler]</c> inside the Assembly <c>TestAssembly</c>.
/// </summary>
[GeneratedCode("NetEvolve.Pulse.SourceGeneration", "{version}")]
public static partial class PulseRegistrationExtensions
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Registers all <c>[PulseHandler]</c>-annotated handlers from the assembly <c>TestAssembly</c> into the DI container.
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="services">The service collection to add registrations to.</param>
    /// <returns>The same <see cref="IServiceCollection"/> instance for chaining.</returns>
    public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssemblyPulseHandlers(this IServiceCollection services)
    {
        services.TryAddScoped<global::NetEvolve.Pulse.Extensibility.ICommandHandler<global::MyCommand, string>, global::MyCommandHandler>();
        services.TryAddScoped<global::MultiHandler>();
        services.TryAddScoped<global::NetEvolve.Pulse.Extensibility.ICommandHandler<global::AnotherCommand, int>>(static sp => sp.GetRequiredService<global::MultiHandler>());
        services.TryAddScoped<global::NetEvolve.Pulse.Extensibility.IEventHandler<global::MyEvent>>(static sp => sp.GetRequiredService<global::MultiHandler>());
        services.TryAddScoped<global::NetEvolve.Pulse.Extensibility.IQueryHandler<global::QueryA, string>, global::GenericQueryHandler<global::QueryA, string>>();
        services.TryAddScoped<global::NetEvolve.Pulse.Extensibility.IQueryHandler<global::QueryB, int>, global::GenericQueryHandler<global::QueryB, int>>();

        return services;
    }
}
